content.rendered:
/ client reviews

Our Results Turn To Testimonials That Speak For Us.

We have the experience to back up our expertise and confidence in delivering results. We pride ourselves on delivering impressive results for our clients and look forward to helping you take your business to new heights!

“They did a phenomenal job rolling out our new website. After working through a few revisions, we came up with exactly what we were looking for. Thank you, 1111 Media Group!”

corporate service

“Working with 1111 has not only elevated the quality of our company’s marketing materials – but has been an absolute pleasure. The team provides exceptional customer service no matter the scope of the project.”

law firm

When it comes to digital marketing and SEO for your company. Look no further! Thank you 1111 Media group for building us up on search results. Highly Recommended”

construction company

“We have worked with 1111 Media Group in several projects. It has been a pleasure working with them. We are highly satisfied with their services. We highly recommend 1111 Media Group.”

Healthcare

“1111 Media Group was an incredible asset when my company redesigned our website and image. The attention to detail and creativity went far beyond my expectations. I would highly recommend using their services. I’m certain you will be as pleased as I am.”

shipping company

1111 Media Group has helped my company in many ways. From website design to SEO and social media marketing. Everything they do is well made and the quality of the company is top notch!

roofing company

“The team at 1111 Media Group is awesome. Committed to excellence, communicative, and just “On It.” Great company to team up with for any projects you currently have or are planning in the near future. They deliver results. I look forward to our continued relationship.”

professional service

“It has been a pleasure getting to work alongside and collaborate with 1111 Media Group. They are a talented group of fun people dedicated to producing quality work. They are in tune with their clients, efficient and responsive throughout the entirety of a project, and disciplined in their execution.”

manufacturing company

“Love the attention to detail and how flexible our project manger has been working with us.”

roofing company

“I’d like to say they offer Excellent Digital Marketing services at a fair and honest price. 2 years so far and no complaints, only growth. Thanks.”

Food services

“They were very transparent and told us exactly what we needed to grow our Jewelry business here in Miami. We highly recommend partnering with 1111 Media Group.”

Jewelry Store

“For the company I work for, I needed to source a web company that could be able to provide a robust website that could support our sales process. Since the beginning, I have been provided amazing service by 1111 Media Group, especially our project manager, Laura.”

roofing company

“I can’t imagine having another set of individuals help guide us through the world of SEO.”

retail

“Their communication was excellent. Every time I needed something, they always found time for me. Highly recommended!”

lawn care

“I’ve worked with a few external partners in the past, but none as thorough, patient, and knowledgeable as the team at 1111 Media Group. I’m 100% satisfied with our decision to hire them for our digital marketing strategy this year.”

Non Profit

“After a very thorough selection process, we chose 1111 Media Group for our website redesign. The project manager assigned to our redesign was completely professional throughout the entire process. Their communication was spot on and any issues that arose during the process were handled quickly and efficiently. We would highly recommend 1111 Media Group to anyone looking for a website overhaul.”

equipment supplier

“A true diamond in the rough… leaps and bounds better than our previous vendor.”

construction company

“1111 Media Group for us has been much more like a partnership than a client-customer relationship. They really feel like they are part of our team. We feel very fortunate to have found them.”

Recreation Company

“I have used 1111 Media Group for several different projects over the past 3 years. I liked their work so much I have retained them on monthly basis as the marketing solution for my company. It is rare to find a company as well-rounded as 1111 Media. I can’t speak highly enough of them. Hiring them was the best business decision I have ever made.”

restaurant

“1111 Media Group has been a game changer for our web strategy.”

manufacturing company

“1111 Media Group provides the highest quality customer service and is always there to answer our questions.”

B2B Distributor

“1111 Media Group is a great company to work with! Their team is dedicated to their clients and you can tell they truly enjoy their work and have a real passion for what they do!

medical diagnostic imaging

“1111 Media Group is a great company to partner with. We’ve received multiple compliments on our website design and have noticed an increased call volume.”

Floor tile supplier

“Since we began working with 1111 Media Group, it has been a pleasure. They have been a major factor in the growth of our company. The attention to detail and the effort put forth have elevated our company on Google to levels we were unable to reach prior. I highly recommend using them if you are looking for growth in your business.”

dental group

“1111 Media Group has done a great job improving our organic search results. We saw a 185% increase in our first year working with them.”

Recycling Company

“1111 Media Group has helped us to reach the people who are looking for us. Not only is our message clear, but our audience is able to find us now.”

Automotive

“1111 Media Group has done an excellent job optimizing our website and improving social media content. As a result, a record number of new patients are seeking care at our practice.”

Healthcare Provider

“The production work was fantastic, they made my business staff, who had no experience shooting any videos before, feel completely at ease. We shopped around for a couple of months, but when we met Chad and his team, we knew that they were right for us. I would highly recommend them to any business looking to grow their brand. Super professional all around.”

food service

“Came into contact with 1111 Media Group via a former employer. Now that I’ve branched out and started my own business, I continue to deal with them directly. They are great at designing websites and marketing; ongoing communication is a godsend.”

Furniture Sales

“I have worked with 1111 Media Group’s team twice now on 2 separate projects. They offer a great reflection of skill, experience, honesty, and service. Fast turnaround, 3 weeks and we got our beautiful website!”

Fitness Coach

“1111 Media Group team is extremely personable, and they feel like an extension of our team, not just a third-party partner. They are the best digital marketing agency I have ever worked with.”

distributor

“Awesome energy from such a wonderful team! So many lovely things to say about the video I put on my website and what this great company delivers. 1111 Media Group really delivered some wonderful videos. I can’t say enough. Thank you!”

Home Remodeling Company

“1111 Media Group is a great company with a very knowledgeable and experienced team! I would not hesitate to recommend their services to any other of my business contacts.”

BEHAVIORAL THERAPY CENTER

“They are results-driven and WILL get you the results you are after. I cannot believe I waited so long to let someone re-design and handle my website for me. Don’t make the mistake I did – hire 1111 Media Group.”

Moving Services

“I would highly recommend 1111 Media Group for social media management and content creation. The team at 1111 Media Group is very professional and thorough in their work. Their article writing and design are top-notch!”

Real Estate Company

“1111 Media Group was honestly amazing with their Website Design delivering what they promised and more. I would definitely recommend this company for anything dealing with marketing and exposure.”

Aviation Company

“They are fast and attentive; you can actively see where your marketing dollars are going.”

retail

“Our project manager has been so great to work with! 1111 Media Group takes the time to understand our company and industry, making an accurate campaign without us having to carry the heavy load.”

Air Ambulance Company

“Best marketing agency in Miami, very nice and patient. easy to connect with and felt comfortable. Very happy!”

Insurance Company

“1111 Media Group is our go-to team for all Social Media and PPC services. The recycling industry isn’t very sexy to work on, but the team has been diligent, and we have seen leads jump drastically. I have no trouble recommending 1111 Media Group for their PPC and social media services. Shout out to our project manager at 1111 Media Group.”

Recycling Company

“The friendly service and quality work speaks for itself. Thanks 1111 Media Group!”

HEALTHCARE CENTER

1111 Media Group is a great partner in our company’s success. They take the time to understand our business and put campaigns in place to meet our specific needs. They also bring fresh new ideas to the table on a regular basis. Excellent marketing agency to work with.”

Outdoor recreation

“1111 Media Group is a valued extension of our team and a vital resource for all our digital marketing efforts.”

non-profit

“Grateful for the team at 1111 Media Group. They are constantly trying to help you improve and squeeze every last bit of value out of your monthly fee.”

Pool Cover Supply Company

“1111 Media Group has made my job easier while also helping my organization earn better SEO rankings. I’ve been working with 1111 Media Group for about 4 years and couldn’t be happier.”

Roofing Company

“The team at 1111 Media Group are the complete package for our social media needs! They handle everything from ad design to target marketing to page administration!”

GOURMET FOOD distributor

“1111 Media Group is the best company I have had to opportunity to work with in our family’s 30 year old company. They have exceeded every expectation on every level- month after month.”

Construction Supply Company

“A great team that allowed us to modernize our website and become digitally relevant. Thank you, 1111 Media Group, for moving us in the right direction!”

Wallpaper Installation Company

“1111 Media Group allows growing your social media platforms to be stress-free! They are knowledgeable and adapt to your company’s needs!”

Bespoke Tailor

“1111 Media Group made the website building process very streamlined and easy. They were very responsive and positive towards last-minute changes.”

Medical Research Company

“Our project manager has been absolutely wonderful to work with. Great results on our SEO and PPC campaign.”

Flooring Company

“1111 Media Group has been a game changer for our web strategy.”

HOME IMPROVEMENT COMPANY

“1111 Media Group has done a great job at improving our search ad results. We’ve been able to reach many more prospective and current clients, educating them about new products and services to help them in their work.”

Music School

“1111 Media Group has consistently driven more customers to my business year over year. It continues to climb. I’m very happy!.”

Hair Salon

“1111 Media Group consistently provides positive results and ongoing improvements to my company.”

Animal Health Provider

“1111 Media Group is perfect for a small marketing department that wants a large reach for their organization.”

WELLNESS CENTER

“1111 Media Group has provided us with great service and expertise for years!

Automotive

“1111 Media Group was great to work with. The team transformed my crude layout of what we wanted perfectly.”

Boat Rental Company

“We’ve worked with 1111 Media Group for years, and they’re the most professional, knowledgeable digital marketing agency we’ve ever dealt with. They transformed our online marketing from almost nonexistent to exceeding our expectations—our customers no longer have trouble finding our website online or confusing it with a competitor’s.”

skin care clinic

“1111 Media Group clearly exceeded our expectations for Web design, social media, and PPC.”

Food Distributor

“I spent nearly a year researching over a dozen digital marketing companies before I finally chose 1111 Media Group. The decision was not easy, but it was the right one. They make me look smarter every month. Thank you 1111 Media Group!”

BUSINESS CONSULTANT FIRM

“With the 1111 Media Group team, we’re seeing significant improvements in returns and engagements. We’re excited to see additional future growth with their implemented strategies.”

ALARM SYSTEM INSTALLATION

“1111 Media Group did everything they said they would do and did it on time! The whole process was very easy!”

GARAGE DOOR COMPANY
